normalized_title: City of Melville Local Planning Scheme No. 6 - Scheme Map No. 6 of 8 (Murdoch Locality)
scope_summary: Statutory zoning map sheet 6 of 8 for City of Melville Local Planning Scheme No. 6, covering the Murdoch locality (and adjoining parts of Kardinya/Winthrop street network). It depicts local scheme reserves (district/local distributor roads, public open space, public purposes), local scheme zones (Centre, Residential, Light Industry, Service Commercial, Mixed Use, Special Use, Urban Development) and R-Codes density codings (R20-R80, R-AC0) parcel by parcel, plus Additional Use (A1), Restricted Use (R1) and Special Use Area (SU1) annotations. The scheme was gazetted on Friday 27 May 2016; this sheet is Version No 1 with a plot date of 7 November 2024.
quality_flags: scheme map drawing: low text volume is expected, not a defect
OCR of map labels is heavily scrambled (street names fragmented and reordered); only the legend, title block and density codes are reliable
density codes (R20/R25/R30/R40/R60/R80/R-AC0) are present in text but cannot be tied to specific parcels from the extraction; the PDF/GIS map must be consulted for site-specific zoning
